overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic industrial district during golden hour. The player moves from under an elevated highway past industrial tanks and metal structures toward a large circular stadium, encountering scattered pedestrians and futuristic vehicles along the way.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the industrial street toward the metal bridge structure ahead

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure spanning overhead with support pillars
large cylindrical storage tank with industrial markings and pipes
heavy industrial metal truss bridge spanning across the road ahead
vertical array of red triangular warning symbols mounted on building
tall modern street lamp with rectangular light fixture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking under a massive elevated highway structure. The camera moves forward along an asphalt road toward a heavy metal truss bridge, with a large cylindrical industrial tank visible to the left and red neon warning signs on the right. The area is devoid of pedestrians and vehicles, creating an atmosphere of industrial solitude.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved industrial road with stadium view

events.description: turns right corner revealing large circular stadium in the distance
exits deep shadow of overpass into area with more direct golden hour sunlight

agents.ego_description: turning right and continuing along the curved road with the stadium now visible ahead

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving along the road ahead toward the stadium

entered.detail: massive circular stadium with tiered white and blue exterior rings dominating the skyline
tall industrial chimneys emitting white steam against the sky

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right, revealing a stunning view of a massive circular stadium in the distance. The scene transitions from the enclosed underpass to a more open curved road, with industrial smokestacks visible on the right. The lighting shifts as the camera moves out of deep shadow into warm golden hour sunlight.

events.description: approaches and crosses marked pedestrian crosswalk with white stripes
passes group of pedestrians standing near palm trees on sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk while heading toward the stadium area

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians standing on the sidewalk corner conversing

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the sidewalk adding organic contrast to industrial setting
vertical traffic signal showing green light
white striped pedestrian crossing painted on asphalt

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a wide intersection with full sky visibility and direct golden hour lighting. The camera crosses a marked pedestrian crosswalk while the stadium remains visible to the left. Palm trees appear along the sidewalk, and a small group of pedestrians stands near the corner as the camera passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along industrial building with neon signage

events.description: futuristic yellow sports car drives past on the street to the left
sun appears directly in frame creating strong lens flare and dramatic backlighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing pedestrians and observing the industrial architecture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in opposite direction wearing casual futuristic clothing
yellow futuristic sports car with sleek design driving past on the street

entered.detail: dark industrial building facade with prominent red neon triangular warning signs
green metal pedestrian railing along the sidewalk edge
red neon sign reading NO ENTRY mounted on building wall

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk next to an industrial building with prominent red neon signage, the camera passes several pedestrians. A futuristic yellow sports car drives past on the street. The setting sun creates a dramatic lens flare as the camera moves toward the light, with industrial smokestacks visible in the background.

events.description: enters more enclosed area with dense overhead industrial structures and power lines

agents.ego_description: continuing along the covered walkway with the setting sun creating long shadows ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction under the overpass

entered.detail: dense network of overhead electrical cables and wires crisscrossing between poles
heavy industrial metal framework structure spanning across the walkway
metal industrial staircase with railings leading up to higher level

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into a more enclosed industrial walkway with dense overhead power lines and metal gantry structures. The setting sun creates long shadows and strong backlighting ahead. The camera follows a pedestrian walking in the same direction under the elevated highway structure, with industrial staircases and frameworks visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the oppressive shadows of an industrial underpass into the brilliant glow of a golden hour cityscape. It begins by moving along an asphalt road beneath a massive elevated highway, passing a cylindrical industrial tank and red neon signs in a state of solitude. As the camera turns right, the enclosed space opens up into a curved road where the lighting shifts from deep shadow to warm sunlight, revealing a massive circular stadium and distant smokestacks. The scene then expands into a wide, sun-drenched intersection with palm trees and pedestrians, where a futuristic yellow sports car drives past amidst dramatic lens flares from the setting sun. Finally, the camera moves back into a more enclosed industrial walkway, following a pedestrian under a dense canopy of power lines and metal gantries as long shadows stretch across the framework.
